panels.description: Current boiler water temperature measured by the Viessmann boiler sensor.
panels.title: Kessel Ist

panels.description: Target boiler water temperature calculated by the weather-compensated controller.
panels.title: Kessel Soll

panels.description: Collective fault indicator. Any active fault triggers red alarm state.
panels.title: Stoerung

panels.description: Current operating mode of heating circuit M1.
panels.title: Betriebsmodus

panels.description: Current hot water temperature measured at the storage tank.
panels.title: Warmwasser Ist

panels.description: Target hot water temperature set on the Viessmann controller.
panels.title: Warmwasser Soll

panels.description: Current burner state. ON = actively firing. OFF = standby or pump post-run.
panels.title: Brenner

panels.description: Current outdoor temperature measured by the Netatmo outdoor module.
panels.title: Außen (Netatmo)

panels.description: Current outdoor temperature as reported by the Tado cloud API.
panels.title: Außen (Tado)

panels.description: Current outdoor temperature measured by the Viessmann outdoor sensor connected to the Vitotronic KW2.
panels.title: Außen (Viessmann)

panels.description: Outdoor temperature comparison across Netatmo, Tado, and Viessmann sensors. Useful for cross-validating sensor accuracy.
panels.title: Outdoor Temperature – All Sources

panels.description: Actual vs. target temperatures for the boiler and hot water circuit.
panels.title: Boiler & Hot Water

panels.description: Measured room temperatures for upper floor zones from Tado and Netatmo.
panels.title: Room Temperature – Upper Floor

panels.description: Measured room temperatures for lower floor zones from Tado.
panels.title: Room Temperature – Lower Floor

panels.description: Current heating demand as a percentage for each Tado zone. Shows which rooms are actively calling for heat.
panels.title: Heating Power – All Zones (current)

panels.description: Heating power over time for upper floor zones. Correlate with outdoor temperature to assess insulation efficiency.
panels.title: Heating Power – Upper Floor

panels.description: Heating power over time for lower floor zones.
panels.title: Heating Power – Lower Floor
